title: Resources at Morgan State for Translational and Community-Engaged Research — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-10-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Resources at Morgan State to Help You Do Translational and Community-Engaged Research', co-presented by Gillian Silver (MPH, CPH, CRA) and Payam Sheikhattari (MD, MPH). Earlier companion to the 2025-10-08 CBPR D-RED seminar. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/C92-mFjM68yPysj14Q6NEq-vRbCYi77G-dNGIW9Kbot-hUb-Xru6UiLHQIu448Ap.vgwOUgD4zkuIT2CU
